subject: History
overall_learning_objectives: Analyse the reasons for the arrival of European trading companies in India
Evaluate how trading factories strengthened the political influence of the East India Company
Critically examine the causes and consequences of the Battle of Plassey
Assess the significance of the Battle of Buxar in the expansion of Company rule
Explain the importance of Diwani rights in strengthening British administrative control
Analyse how the East India Company transformed from a trading organisation into a political power

lesson_plan.title: European Trade and the East India Company
topics_covered: Formation of the East India Company
Trade goods and global trade networks
student_activities: Analyse why European traders were attracted to Indian markets
Identify major trade routes and trading centers on a map
Discuss the importance of Indian textiles and spices in global trade

lesson_plan.title: Trading Factories and Political Influence
topics_covered: Growth of British influence in Indian politics
student_activities: Prepare a short explanation on how trading factories strengthened Company power
Create a map marking major British trading settlements
Discuss how economic interests influenced political expansion

lesson_plan.title: Battle of Plassey: Causes and Consequences
topics_covered: Role of Siraj-ud-Daulah, Robert Clive, and Mir Jafar
Impact of the Battle of Plassey
student_activities: Prepare a cause–effect chart explaining the Battle of Plassey
Discuss how internal conflicts helped the Company win the battle
Write a short explanation on why the battle was a turning point in Indian history

lesson_plan.title: Battle of Buxar and Consolidation of Power
topics_covered: Background of the Battle of Buxar
Importance of the battle in British expansion
student_activities: Compare the Battles of Plassey and Buxar
Discuss why the Battle of Buxar strengthened Company authority more than Plassey
Prepare a short analytical note on the significance of the battle

lesson_plan.title: Diwani Rights and Company Administration
topics_covered: Impact on revenue collection and administration
student_activities: Explain the significance of Diwani rights in strengthening Company power
Analyse how revenue collection affected farmers and local rulers
Create a short note on the administrative changes introduced by the Company

lesson_plan.title: Expansion of Company Rule and Critical Revision
topics_covered: Transformation from trade to political rule
student_activities: Create a flowchart showing the expansion of Company power
Discuss how economic motives led to political domination

teacher_tip: Encourage students to analyse historical events critically by connecting economic interests, political strategies, and military conflicts that led to the expansion of British rule in India.
